title: isodon ternifolius
intro: Isodon ternifolius, also known as 'Chinese Chrysanthemum Balm', is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Isodon ternifolius include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and treating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Isodon ternifolius can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
